pi_items.source: Found in task description instructions and setup_task.sh synthetic data injection.
Found in task description instructions and setup_task.sh synthetic data injection.
Derived from task description: 'Diagnosis: 401.1 or I10 (Essential Hypertension)'.
Found in task description instructions: 'CPT/Procedure Code: 99214'.
Extracted from task description note text: 'Blood pressure well-controlled on current medication regimen.'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic patient named Elena Vasquez, dynamically inserted by the setup script. The target values for the clinical encounter (Date: 2025-01-15, Diagnosis codes: 401.1/I10 for hypertension, CPT code: 99214, and specific clinical notes mentioning 'blood pressure well-controlled') are explicitly provided as instructions in the task description. These are standard medical codes accurately reflecting the requested diagnosis and procedure.
